nodes.label: Core Concept
nodes.definition: Primary concept this topic revolves around.
nodes.whyItMatters: It anchors how related tools and decisions should be interpreted.
nodes.safeSentence: The core concept is the stable framing model for this topic.
nodes.commonTrap: Using tool-specific jargon before explaining the underlying concept.
nodes.interviewAnswer: I start with the core concept, then map implementation choices to it.
relatedQuestions: How would you explain this concept to a new teammate?
What breaks when this concept is misunderstood?

note.summary: Lead with concept-first explanations before implementation details.

nodes.label: Key Entity
nodes.definition: Important object/resource the concept operates on.
nodes.whyItMatters: Correct entity boundaries reduce confusion and rework.
nodes.safeSentence: I define the key entity before discussing advanced workflows.

nodes.label: Input Data
nodes.definition: Required inputs to start the workflow.
nodes.safeSentence: Reliable outcomes depend on reliable inputs.

nodes.label: Processing Step
nodes.definition: Transformation or operation that converts input to output.
nodes.whyItMatters: This is where most practical errors and delays appear.
nodes.safeSentence: I make processing steps observable and repeatable.

nodes.label: Output Artifact
nodes.definition: Deliverable output consumed by users or downstream systems.
nodes.whyItMatters: Clear outputs improve adoption and verification.
nodes.safeSentence: Outputs should be testable and easy to interpret.

nodes.label: Quality Check
nodes.definition: Validation gates that verify result correctness.
nodes.whyItMatters: Checks prevent silent failure and false confidence.

nodes.label: Failure Mode
nodes.definition: Known way the workflow can fail or degrade.
nodes.safeSentence: I design mitigations around known failure modes.

paths.label: Fundamentals Lane
paths.description: Explain the concept, entity, and quality baseline.

paths.label: Workflow Lane
paths.description: Walk from input through processing to output with risk checks.
